title: Upon Judith. Epig.
content:
Judith has cast her old skin and got new,
    And walks fresh varnish'd to the public view;
    Foul Judith was and foul she will be known
    For all this fair transfiguration.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Upon Judith. Epig."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
